rationale: The citing paper references Dagogo-Jack and Forehand (2018) as part of a grouped review of prior product-upgrade studies that examine drivers of upgrade decisions. It is also listed in a summary table of prior literature, but the citing paper does not build its hypotheses, mechanism, measures, or analyses directly on this specific paper. The core theory in the citing paper centers on ownership-driven relationship distance, and the cited paper serves mainly as background positioning within the broader stream.
